req.title: Savings goal (idempotency variant)
req.statement: A customer shall create a savings goal with a target amount and target date; progress shall be computed nightly. The operation must be idempotent: duplicate submission with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-096 covers three distinct behaviours: (1) happy-path goal creation with valid inputs, (2) idempotency enforcement via Idempotency-Key, (3) rejection when target_amount <= 0. BVA drives boundary cases at target_amount = 0 (invalid) and target_amount = 0.01 (minimum valid). EP partitions valid vs invalid amounts. STC traces the state from goal absent -> goal created -> duplicate submitted. NEG covers the 422 error path. DT maps Idempotency-Key × payload combinations. Each test is self-contained via fixture-provided auth tokens and unique idempotency keys.

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_valid_inputs_returns_201
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid bearer token
No existing goal with the chosen Idempotency-Key exists
expected: Response body contains progress field initialised to 0
tests.executable:
import uuid
import pytest

def test_create_savings_goal_valid_inputs_returns_201(auth_headers, api_client):
    payload = {
        "target_amount": 500.00,
        "target_date": "2026-01-01"
    }
    idempotency_key = str(uuid.uuid4())
    headers = {**auth_headers, "Idempotency-Key": idempotency_key}

    response = api_client.post("/goals", json=payload, headers=headers)

    assert response.status_code == 201
    body = response.json()
    assert "goal_id" in body
    assert body.get("progress") == 0
    assert float(body.get("target_amount")) == 500.00

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_idempotent_duplicate_returns_same_result
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid bearer token
An initial goal creation with a specific Idempotency-Key has already succeeded
actions: POST /goals first time with target_amount=200.00, target_date='2025-12-31', Idempotency-Key=<fixed_uuid>
POST /goals second time with identical payload and same Idempotency-Key
expected: Both responses contain the same goal_id
Both responses contain identical body content
trace: R-FIN-096: duplicate submission with same Idempotency-Key must return original result
tests.executable:
import uuid
import pytest

def test_create_savings_goal_idempotent_duplicate_returns_same_result(auth_headers, api_client):
    payload = {
        "target_amount": 200.00,
        "target_date": "2025-12-31"
    }
    idempotency_key = str(uuid.uuid4())
    headers = {**auth_headers, "Idempotency-Key": idempotency_key}

    first = api_client.post("/goals", json=payload, headers=headers)
    second = api_client.post("/goals", json=payload, headers=headers)

    assert first.status_code in (200, 201)
    assert second.status_code in (200, 201)
    first_body = first.json()
    second_body = second.json()
    assert first_body["goal_id"] == second_body["goal_id"]
    assert first_body["target_amount"] == second_body["target_amount"]
    assert first_body["progress"] == second_body["progress"]

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_zero_target_amount_returns_422
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid bearer token
expected: Response body contains error detail referencing target_amount

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_negative_target_amount_returns_422
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid bearer token
expected: Response body contains validation error referencing target_amount

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_minimum_valid_target_amount_returns_201
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid bearer token
No existing goal with the chosen Idempotency-Key exists
actions: POST /goals with target_amount=0.01 (minimum valid value above zero), target_date='2026-03-15', Idempotency-Key=<unique_uuid>
trace: R-FIN-096: 422 when target <= 0 (boundary: 0.01 is first valid value)
tests.executable:
import uuid
import pytest

def test_create_savings_goal_minimum_valid_target_amount_returns_201(auth_headers, api_client):
    payload = {
        "target_amount": 0.01,
        "target_date": "2026-03-15"
    }
    headers = {**auth_headers, "Idempotency-Key": str(uuid.uuid4())}

    response = api_client.post("/goals", json=payload, headers=headers)

    assert response.status_code == 201
    body = response.json()
    assert "goal_id" in body
    assert float(body.get("target_amount")) == pytest.approx(0.01)
    assert body.get("progress") == 0
